summary: Classified the live PR inventory shard conservatively. No GitHub mutations, closeouts, merges, fix PRs, or labels are planned because the job disables instant close, merge, fix, and raise_pr paths. Open PRs are kept open or routed to exact maintainer decisions; security-sensitive linked refs are quarantined item-by-item.
